footer.tagline: Systems for young people should be built by young people.

home.heroSubline: Companies just don't know how to reach them.
home.heroBody: We help mid-size and large companies attract, select and retain Gen Z talent — because we are Gen Z ourselves.
home.problemTitle: Companies don't lose Gen Z because this generation is complicated.
home.problemVillain: They lose them because systems for young people are designed by people who have never lived their needs.
home.problemItem1: Gen Z candidates don't apply — or leave shortly after joining.
home.problemItem2: Onboarding and HR communication from the last decade is simply ignored by Gen Z.
home.problemItem3: High recruitment costs with results that don't meet expectations.
home.solutionTitle: We're not consultants who read about Gen Z.
home.solutionSubtitle: We are Gen Z who understand your business.
home.solutionItem1: Direct experience from inside the generation — not second-hand.
home.solutionItem2: References: Global Payments, Generali, AV Media.
home.solutionItem3: Smart, targeted solutions with measurable impact.
home.service1Desc: A fully custom trainee program — attracts the right talent, trains them effectively and keeps them at your company.
home.service2Desc: A digital onboarding guide built in tools your company already uses. HR sees everything in real time.
home.service3Desc: An educational workshop for HR teams in three variants — from a general foundation to custom research for your company.
home.service4Desc: An analysis of your career page from Gen Z's perspective — concrete recommendations on what and how to change.
home.step1Desc: We meet and find out whether it makes sense to solve it together. No commitment.
home.step2Title: We get to know your company
home.step2Desc: We understand how things work at your company and what the full context of the problem is.
home.step3Desc: We design a solution precisely for you — easy to implement, with measurable impact.
home.cs1Result: The client received a specific playbook with steps on how to communicate with junior colleagues and attract young talent.
home.cs2Result: The team left with four specific steps to optimize communication and onboarding.
home.cs3Result: Key barriers in recruitment identified and specific communication adjustments proposed.
home.testimonial1Quote: Thanks to GTC we finally understood what our junior colleagues actually need. Onboarding works now.
home.teamTitle: We are Gen Z ourselves. We understand this generation from the inside.
home.member1Bio: Adam works with companies on their Gen Z hiring and onboarding processes. He has personally gone through dozens of interviews and knows this generation from the inside.
home.ctaDesc: Book a no-obligation call or download our free guide.

services.title: How we help companies work with Gen Z
services.subtitle: Five concrete ways to improve recruitment, onboarding and retention of young talent.
services.notSureDesc: Every company is different. If you're not sure what you need, let's start with a conversation.

traineeProgram.title: Trainee program
traineeProgram.subtitle: We'll build you a trainee program that attracts the right young people, trains them effectively and keeps them at your company — exactly according to your goals.
traineeProgram.whatText: A fully custom trainee program tailored to both Gen Z and your company. The output includes a management interface in a tool your company already uses, a manual on how to run the program, and a communication strategy — both internally and externally.
traineeProgram.gainText: A tool that attracts talented young people, effectively develops them toward results, and keeps them in the company — according to goals you define yourself. Plus a strong employer branding signal: your company is meeting Gen Z halfway.
traineeProgram.forText: Companies that want to attract, develop and retain Gen Z — and signal to the world that they care about the younger generation.
traineeProgram.differentiatorText: The program is not a template. It's built to meet the needs of Gen Z while fitting the company's capabilities. It leads to achieving pre-defined goals — the company knows exactly what a young employee who completes the program should look like.
traineeProgram.timelineText: 1 to 6 months depending on the scope and complexity of the collaboration.

onboardingApp.title: Onboarding app
onboardingApp.subtitle: Onboarding that guides new hires through the beginning without chaos — and gives HR an overview of what's happening with each new employee.
onboardingApp.whatText: A clear digital onboarding guide built in a tool your company already uses (Notion, Teams, etc.). It gradually releases tasks so new hires aren't overwhelmed, and HR has real-time visibility — where each new hire is, whether they're stuck, and how quickly they're progressing.
onboardingApp.gainText: New hires get oriented faster and don't lose motivation right at the start. HR sees who is progressing well and who needs help — and can intervene in time. You also immediately see who is engaged from day one and who isn't.
onboardingApp.forText: Any company that wants to have onboarding under control. Works for all generations — with an emphasis on Gen Z's standards and expectations, which set the bar for the whole team.
onboardingApp.differentiatorText: The app is built on a real understanding of what Gen Z needs at the beginning at a company. It's not just a checklist of tasks — it's a guide that takes new hires through the beginning so they feel good and deliver results as soon as possible.

genzWorkshop.title: Gen Z Workshop
genzWorkshop.subtitle: A workshop that teaches your HR team to understand Gen Z — in three variants depending on how deep you want to go.
genzWorkshop.whatText: An educational workshop for HR teams that helps understand how Gen Z thinks, what it needs from HR and managers, and which myths about it simply aren't true.
genzWorkshop.gainText: An HR team that truly understands Gen Z — and knows how to work with them, communicate, and lead them. Not general theory, but insights directly applicable in their reality.
genzWorkshop.forText: HR teams in mid-size and large companies that work with young employees or are hiring them.
genzWorkshop.variant1Desc: Fixed program, quick start. A great foundation for anyone starting out with Gen Z or wanting to understand the generation as a whole.
genzWorkshop.variant2Desc: Tailored to your industry and company based on GenZ Consulting's data and research. Participants leave with insights directly from their world.
genzWorkshop.variant3Desc: We'll build research specifically for your company and industry. Data that nobody else has.

careerPages.title: Career pages for Gen Z
careerPages.subtitle: Find out exactly why Gen Z visits your career page but doesn't apply — and get concrete recommendations on what and how to change.
careerPages.whatText: An expert analysis of your company's career page from Gen Z's perspective. GZC goes through your career page, identifies specific pain points that discourage Gen Z candidates from submitting a CV, and delivers a clear summary of recommendations — with an explanation of why and how to change it.
careerPages.gainText: A clear overview of what works on the career page and what puts Gen Z off before they even send a CV. Concrete recommendations on what and how to change — not general advice, but precise steps with an explanation of why Gen Z sees it this way.
careerPages.forText: Companies investing in Gen Z recruitment but not getting results that match expectations. HR and Employer Branding teams who suspect the career page isn't optimal — but don't know exactly where and why.
careerPages.differentiatorText: We evaluate the career page from a perspective nobody else has — directly from the point of view of Gen Z that also understands the business context. It's not a general UX audit, but an analysis of how your page is seen by exactly the person you want to attract.
careerPages.timelineText: 2 to 6 weeks depending on the scope and complexity of the career page.

customSolution.title: Not sure where to start or looking for something different?
customSolution.subtitle: Every company is different. If you're not sure what you need — or you know exactly what you want but didn't find it in our products — let's start with a conversation.
customSolution.whatText: We'll jointly diagnose where the biggest obstacle is and propose a solution directly for your situation. The result can be one of our products or something built completely custom.
customSolution.forText: Companies that know they have a problem with Gen Z but don't know how to approach it. And companies that know exactly what they want — it just doesn't exist as a ready-made product yet.

about.title: Systems for young people should be built by young people.
about.subtitle: We are GenZ Consulting — consultants who are Gen Z not from the outside, but from the inside.
about.storyText: GenZ Consulting was born from a simple idea: companies lose Gen Z talent not because this generation is complicated — but because systems for young people are built by people from another generation who cannot fully understand their needs and expectations.
about.storyText2: We're different. We are Gen Z ourselves and we understand how companies work. Our solutions don't come from theory — they come from real first-hand experience.
about.missionText: To help mid-size and large companies build environments where Gen Z wants to work, stays longer and delivers results.
about.value1Desc: Not consultants who read about Gen Z. We live this generation from the inside.
about.value2Desc: We understand that a company needs concrete results, not theory.
about.value3Desc: No templates. Every solution is built precisely for your company and situation.
about.member1Bio: Adam works with companies on their Gen Z hiring and onboarding processes. He has personally gone through dozens of interviews and knows this generation from the inside.

caseStudies.title: Projects where we helped
caseStudies.subtitle: Concrete results from real collaboration with mid-size and large companies.
caseStudies.cs1Desc: In-depth Gen Z research for AV Media — interviews, analysis and transcription. Outputs processed into a GenZ Playbook directly for their team.
caseStudies.cs1Result: The client received a specific playbook with steps on how to communicate with junior colleagues and attract young talent.
caseStudies.cs2Desc: An interactive workshop for the HR team on how Gen Z actually works — first-hand, not from theory.
caseStudies.cs2Result: The team left with four specific steps to optimize communication and onboarding.
caseStudies.cs3Desc: Analysis of career page and hiring process focused on how job offers are communicated to Gen Z.
caseStudies.cs3Result: Key barriers in recruitment identified and specific communication adjustments proposed.
caseStudies.ctaDesc: Book a no-obligation call and we'll find out how we can help your company.

contact.title: Let's set up a meeting.
contact.subtitle: Book a no-obligation call. We'll find out what's troubling you and answer all your questions.
contact.faq1Q: What does the first meeting look like?
contact.faq1A: It's a no-obligation 30-minute call. We find out what's troubling you, explain how we approach solving it, and you decide whether it makes sense to continue.
contact.faq2Q: What size companies do you work with?
contact.faq2A: Primarily mid-size and large companies (50+ employees) where working with Gen Z is systematically important.
contact.faq3Q: How long does the collaboration take?
contact.faq3A: It depends on the service — from a one-off workshop to a 6-month trainee program build. We always propose a scope that makes sense for your situation.
contact.faq4Q: Do you work with companies outside Prague?
contact.faq4A: Yes, we work with companies throughout the Czech Republic. Workshops and meetings can be done in-person or online.
